question: Will the FOMC raise the federal funds rate at its July 28-29, 2026 meeting?
source: live web search (federalreserve.gov, Forbes, Polymarket, Wells Fargo) — all post-Jan-2026 cutoff

snippets.title: FOMC expected to leave rates unchanged at July 28-29 meeting, preserving option to tighten
June FOMC: Board voted unanimously to keep rate on reserve balances at 3.65%; range 3.5%-3.75%
June 18 data showed stronger growth and elevated inflation, reducing odds of cuts; markets raised odds of a 25bps HIKE in July
New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh withholds his dot-plot projection, signaling skepticism of forward guidance and strategic ambiguity
Median 2026 fed funds forecast increased, implying potential for one rate HIKE before year-end 2026
